hook: The neobank that closes a trucker's books while they sleep.
core_problem: 1.9M US owner-operators run their books in shoeboxes; existing neobanks treat them as 1099-W2 hybrids and miss IFTA, per-diem, and load-factoring economics.
ai_leverage: Vision agent ingests bills of lading + fuel receipts; ledger agent files IFTA quarterly; replaces a $4-6k/yr human bookkeeper.
monetization_logic: $29/mo SaaS + 0.8% interchange + 1.5% factoring spread; net ARPU ~$110/mo at month 6.
distribution_strategy: Truck-stop wedge + DAT/Truckstop.com partnerships; community via owner-operator subreddits and CDL TikTok.
retention_loop: Quarter-locked filings + factored receivables create 90-day switching cost; data flywheel improves load-pricing recommendations.

moat_potential.rationale: Quarterly filings + factored receivables create 90-day lock; load-data flywheel compounds.

scalability_rationale: TAM $2B SaaS + $10B factoring; constrained by trucker onboarding velocity, not technology.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: solo owner-operators. Stage 2: small fleets (2-20). Stage 3: factoring marketplace + load-pricing data network sold to brokers.
failure_avoidance: commoditization_collapse: vertical-deep with IFTA + factoring vs Dave's mass-market trap
regulatory_blind_spot: SOC 2 + state money-transmitter licenses scoped pre-launch
validation_invocation: Defensible quarterly switching cost; cash-flow positive by month 9; reject growth at the cost of margin.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Receipts, BOLs, fuel cards, factoring ledger; per-trucker vector store for tax q&a.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: Vercel + Supabase + Inngest cron; Sentry; LaunchDarkly.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Operator approves filed returns >$5k or factoring advances >$25k.

ui_ux_invocation: Trucker texts a photo of a receipt; agent files it; weekly digest in app; chat for q&a.

hook: Quarterly taxes that file themselves the moment a creator gets paid.
core_problem: 12M US 1099 creators owe quarterly estimated taxes and routinely under-withhold; April becomes a $4k surprise.
ai_leverage: Income-classification agent watches Stripe/PayPal/Patreon webhooks; tax engine sweeps the right % into a sub-account; auto-files Form 1040-ES.
distribution_strategy: Stripe App Marketplace + Patreon partnership; PLG via 'Tax-Withheld Stripe link' wedge.
retention_loop: IRS payment history is locked to the account; switching mid-year forfeits filing continuity.

moat_potential.rationale: Sits inside payment webhooks; survives even if creator changes banks.

scalability_rationale: Webhook-driven; marginal cost is API calls, not human review.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: solo creators. Stage 2: agencies + small studios. Stage 3: cross-border creator tax (EU VAT, UK PAYE).
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: tax filing is licensed; partner with a registered EFIN provider day one
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the IRS-filing pipeline, not a UI on top of TurboTax
validation_invocation: Own the payment-webhook data layer; competitors see only end-of-year statements while we see every transaction.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Cloudflare Workers + Stripe webhooks + Increase.com
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Webhook stream from Stripe/PayPal; IRS publication index for deductions.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Operator reviews any return >$10k owed or any audit flag from the IRS.

ui_ux_invocation: Creator never opens the app until April; receives a 'You owe $0, we already paid it' email.

hook: A 60-second SMB credit decision built on cash-flow telemetry, not credit bureau lag.
core_problem: 30M US SMBs are underwritten on FICO + tax returns months stale; the data exists in Stripe/QuickBooks but no underwriter ingests it natively.
ai_leverage: Cash-flow agent ingests Stripe/Plaid/QuickBooks streams; underwriting agent renders a decision + price in 60s; replaces a 2-week bank pull.
monetization_logic: 1.5-3% origination fee + 50-100bps servicing; charged only on funded loans.
distribution_strategy: Embedded inside vertical SaaS (Toast, Mindbody, Jobber); revenue share with the SaaS.
retention_loop: Cash-flow data is continuously re-scored; SMBs return for line increases; SaaS partner gets a new monetization line.

moat_potential.rationale: Multi-source cash-flow corpus across verticals improves underwriting; partners cannot leave without losing decisioning.

scalability_rationale: API-driven; capital is partner-supplied (warehouses); operating leverage is enormous.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: embed in 5 vertical SaaS. Stage 2: own the warehouse facility. Stage 3: license decision engine to community banks.
failure_avoidance: fake_ai_trap: publish quarterly automation-rate metrics + auditor letter
regulatory_blind_spot: ECOA/UDAAP-compliant adverse-action notices generated automatically
validation_invocation: Own the multi-source cash-flow data layer; underwriters relying on FICO are running blind.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Python + FastAPI + Postgres + Plaid + Codat + LendAPI
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Bank, AR, AP, payroll, Stripe; bureau supplement only.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + RDS + KMS; SOC 2 Type II in year one.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Compliance officer reviews any decline; risk officer approves any policy change.

ui_ux_invocation: SMB clicks 'Get a $50k line' inside Toast; sees a price + accept button in 60 seconds.

hook: An AI agent that opens your medical, telecom, and SaaS invoices and negotiates them down — for free unless it wins.
core_problem: US households overpay $2.4k/yr in negotiable bills (medical, telecom, gym, SaaS); existing services (Truebill, BillShark) charge 40% upfront and rarely touch medical.
ai_leverage: Agent reads scanned bills, identifies negotiable line items, drafts dispute letters, and runs voice negotiation against billing reps; replaces a $50/hr billing advocate.
monetization_logic: 30% of confirmed savings, billed monthly over 12 months; no upfront.
distribution_strategy: Direct-to-consumer via TikTok 'send me your hospital bill' + insurance broker partnerships.
retention_loop: Bills keep arriving; agent's negotiation history with each provider compounds — Anthem learns the agent always wins, settles faster.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-provider negotiation success rates compound; new entrants start at zero.

scalability_rationale: Voice + document; bottleneck is per-provider integration and call wait times.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: medical bill negotiation. Stage 2: full-stack billing-advocacy platform. Stage 3: B2B for HR teams as employee benefit.
failure_avoidance: unsustainable_unit_economics: outcome-based pricing aligns ARR to recovered savings
regulatory_blind_spot: HIPAA-aligned BAA before touching any medical bill
validation_invocation: Free unless we win — economics enforce conviction; reject vanity DAU.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Python + FastAPI + Twilio Voice + Vapi.ai + Postgres
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-provider call scripts, success rates, billing codes (CPT/HCPCS).
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: User approves any settlement over $500 or any release-of-claims clause.

ui_ux_invocation: User snaps a bill; agent drafts a strategy; user clicks 'go'; weekly status updates.

hook: Bloomberg Terminal for the 30M SMBs that can't afford a CFO.
core_problem: SMBs make six-figure cash decisions on QuickBooks balances stale by 24-72h; treasury management is a fortune-500 luxury.
ai_leverage: Forecast agent rebuilds 13-week cash forecast every hour from Plaid/Stripe; sweep agent moves idle balances into T-bills nightly.
monetization_logic: $199-799/mo by company size + 5bps on swept balances; ARPU $400+.
distribution_strategy: Sales-led to 50-200 employee SMBs; CFO advisory firm partnership.
retention_loop: Forecast accuracy improves with company history; switching forfeits 13-week visibility built up over months.

moat_potential.rationale: Cash forecast and sweep policies are encoded in the system; unwinding takes weeks.

scalability_rationale: API + automation; sales cycle is the bottleneck, not delivery.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: SMB treasury. Stage 2: embedded in vertical accounting software. Stage 3: AI CFO bundle (forecasting + AR + AP + tax).
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the forecasting model + sweep execution, not a wrapper on Plaid
fake_ai_trap: publish forecast-accuracy backtests quarterly
validation_invocation: Real-time cash visibility is asymmetric information; static QuickBooks users are flying blind.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + Plaid + Modern Treasury
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Bank, AR, AP, payroll, vendor terms; macro rates feed.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + RDS + KMS; SOC 2 Type II.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: CFO approves any sweep policy change; auto-revert on +/-15% forecast variance.

ui_ux_invocation: Cash dashboard; chat asks 'what if I delay payroll 5 days' and gets a numerically grounded answer.

hook: BSA/AML compliance copilot that turns 4,000 community banks into competitive fintechs.
core_problem: Community banks spend 8-12% of opex on BSA/AML; vendor stacks (NICE Actimize) are mainframe-era and unaffordable for sub-$5B AUM.
ai_leverage: Transaction-monitoring agent triages SAR alerts; KYC agent reviews ID + sanctions hits; replaces 3-5 FTEs per bank.
monetization_logic: $8-25k/mo by AUM tier + per-alert overage; ARPU $15k/mo.
distribution_strategy: ICBA + state banking association partnerships; sales-led with regulator-friendly pitch.
retention_loop: Alert-tuning history is bank-specific; switching loses years of false-positive suppression.

moat_potential.rationale: FFIEC examination-ready audit trails; competitors face years to reach parity.

scalability_rationale: Sales cycle 6-9 months; once integrated, expansion within bank is fast.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: BSA/AML for community banks. Stage 2: full compliance suite (CRA, Reg E, Reg Z). Stage 3: license to credit unions globally.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: SR 11-7 model risk management documentation from day one
fake_ai_trap: human-in-the-loop on every SAR; transparent automation rate
validation_invocation: Regulatory moat compounds; switching costs are existential for banks under examination.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Core banking transactions, OFAC, FinCEN guidance, internal alert history.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS GovCloud-ready; SOC 2 Type II + ISO 27001.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: BSA officer reviews every SAR before filing; model committee approves tuning changes.

ui_ux_invocation: BSA officer reviews triaged alerts in a queue; chat to ask 'why was this flagged' in plain English.

hook: An AI collections agent that recovers 30-day-late invoices without souring the customer relationship.
core_problem: $3.1T US B2B receivables run >30 days late; collections teams are expensive and abrasive; SMBs avoid hiring collectors entirely.
ai_leverage: Voice + email agent runs tone-tuned dunning sequences; payment-plan agent negotiates terms within authority limits.
monetization_logic: 8-15% of collected funds (vs 25-50% for traditional agencies); minimum $99/mo subscription.
distribution_strategy: QuickBooks + Xero app marketplace; PLG with 'connect ledger, see who's overdue' wedge.
retention_loop: Recovery rates improve with debtor history; ledger integration is sticky.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-debtor payment behavior corpus improves negotiation tactics.

scalability_rationale: Voice + email scale linearly with API costs; no per-account human required.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: SMB AR. Stage 2: mid-market ERP integrations. Stage 3: cross-creditor reputation network priced to debt buyers.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FDCPA + state collection license footprint scoped pre-launch
unsustainable_unit_economics: outcome pricing keeps gross margin >70%
validation_invocation: Cash-flow positive on funds recovered; reject vanity DAU.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Python + FastAPI + Postgres + Vapi.ai + Twilio + Stripe
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Ledger, debtor history, FDCPA scripts, dispute outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + RDS; FDCPA-compliant call recording + retention.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Operator approves any settlement <60% of face or any litigation referral.

ui_ux_invocation: SMB sees an inbox of overdue invoices; clicks 'collect' on each; agent runs a 30-day campaign.

hook: A neobank for the 280M diaspora that needs to bank in three currencies and remit home weekly.
core_problem: Diaspora workers pay 6-8% on remittances and lose another 3% to FX; existing solutions (Wise, Remitly) are remit-only and lack a real banking layer.
ai_leverage: Multi-currency ledger agent rebalances across USD/EUR/GBP/INR/PHP nightly; remittance agent times transfers to favorable FX windows.
monetization_logic: Free remit + 0.3% FX spread + 0.5% interchange; $0/mo; ARPU $11/mo.
distribution_strategy: Diaspora community channels (Filipino nurses, Indian engineers, Nigerian fintechers); employer payroll partnerships.
retention_loop: Remit history + bill-pay-back-home compounds; family in country of origin onboards into recipient app.

moat_potential.rationale: Two-sided diaspora ↔ recipient network; switching breaks family payment rails.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: USA diaspora corridors. Stage 2: EU + UK + Gulf corridors. Stage 3: white-label remit rail to community banks.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state MTL + EU PSD2 + RBI inward remit licenses pre-scoped
commoditization_collapse: own the recipient-side experience, not a Wise wrapper
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for diaspora financial life; the platform that makes others rich.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Node + Postgres + Currencycloud + Plaid
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-corridor FX history, recipient bank rails, employer payroll calendars.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + Cloudflare; SOC 2 + PCI; per-jurisdiction data residency.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Compliance reviews any remit >$10k or any sanctioned-country flag.

ui_ux_invocation: User says 'send 200 to mom' in native language; agent times the transfer and confirms via voice.

hook: An options-strategy copilot that explains every Greek before you click buy.
core_problem: 26M US retail options traders execute spreads they don't understand; broker UIs (Robinhood, Schwab) hide risk and don't explain consequences.
ai_leverage: Strategy agent translates intent ('I want upside on NVDA but cap loss at $500') to a defined-risk spread; risk agent simulates 1-30 day P&L paths.
monetization_logic: $29/mo + $99/mo Pro tier; no PFOB to avoid Robinhood-style misalignment.
distribution_strategy: YouTube finance creator partnerships; PLG via free strategy-explainer that requires login to execute.
retention_loop: Trade-journal + outcome tracking creates personalized risk profile; users return to log every position.

moat_potential.rationale: Trust-first brand in a space dominated by gambling-aesthetic apps.

scalability_rationale: Subscription model; broker integrations are the bottleneck.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: options education + execution wrapper. Stage 2: hedge-as-a-service for ETF holders. Stage 3: licensed RIA layer.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FINRA-compliant content review; not a broker-dealer day one
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the simulation engine + journaling, not a UI on TastyTrade
validation_invocation: Defensible brand built on transparent risk; reject PFOB-driven flow monetization.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Options chains, IV surface, user trade journal, outcome history.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + RDS; SOC 2; FINRA-aligned record retention.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Compliance reviews any new strategy template before user-facing release.

ui_ux_invocation: User describes intent in plain English; copilot returns a visualized trade with all Greeks.

hook: An estate plan that updates itself every time you have a baby, buy a house, or change jobs.
core_problem: 67% of US adults have no estate plan; LegalZoom is one-shot and stale within 18 months; lawyers cost $2-5k upfront.
ai_leverage: Life-event agent watches Plaid + payroll + DMV + birth certificates (opt-in) and triggers will/trust amendments; legal agent drafts changes for attorney review.
monetization_logic: $15/mo individual, $25/mo family; bar-licensed attorney review priced per change ($99-299).
distribution_strategy: Embedded in HR benefits stacks; D2C via 'free will draft' wedge.
retention_loop: Estate plan is alive; switching loses continuity and triggers attorney re-review costs.

moat_potential.rationale: Continuous estate-plan history; switching means paying for a fresh attorney review.

scalability_rationale: B2B2C via HR benefits scales fast; attorney review is the bottleneck.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C + HR benefits. Stage 2: probate concierge bundle. Stage 3: cross-jurisdiction estate concierge for HNW.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: UPL boundaries clear; partner with bar-licensed attorneys per state
unsustainable_unit_economics: subscription + per-event upsell keeps CAC payback <12 months
validation_invocation: Indispensable life-event infrastructure for households + employers; both sides depend on us.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Will templates per state, life-event taxonomy, attorney panel.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + KMS-encrypted document store; SOC 2 + state bar compliance.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Bar-licensed attorney signs every binding amendment; user e-signs final.

ui_ux_invocation: Estate plan auto-updates after a life event; user gets a summary + 'approve' email.
